1. Create Wallet

Generate a new Bery address. Save the private key somewhere safe.

Private Key
Hidden
Anyone with this private key can control your funds.

2. Get BRY (Faucet)

Request BRY from the validator faucet to your wallet address.

Balance: -
Nonce: -

3. Send BRY (Validator)

Send BRY from the validator faucet address to any recipient.

Last Transaction Hash
No transaction yet

4. Stake BRY

Connect a browser wallet (MetaMask or similar) and stake BRY into the network.

Connected Address
No wallet connected

Configure your wallet RPC URL to point to this node (e.g. http://localhost:8080/rpc).
Served by the Bery Chain node at the same origin.
